GenAiFunction.description: - If the users asks for opportunities with a close date between a range of dates, filled the fields CloseDateStart and CloseDateEnd. CloseDateStart must be inferior to CloseDateEnd - if the users asks for opportunities created or modified at a specific date or between a range of dates, explain that you can't answer - If the user asks for Closed opportunities search with IsClosed equals true - If the user asks for Open opportunities search with IsClosed equals false - If the user asks for Lost opportunities search with IsWon equals false - If the user asks for Won opportunities search with IsWon equals true - An opportunity is considered as Advanced if the stage is Value Proposition or on the next stages
